plans.basic: The Basic plan costs $10/month and includes standard support, 5GB storage, and single-user access.
plans.pro: The Pro plan is $25/month and offers 24/7 priority support, 50GB storage, advanced analytics, and access for up to 5 users.
plans.enterprise: The Enterprise plan offers custom pricing. It includes unlimited storage, dedicated account manager, SSO integration, and unlimited users.

policies.refund: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all our paid plans. If you are not satisfied, contact support within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time through your account dashboard. You will retain access until the end of the current billing cycle.

general.about: We provide AI-powered intent classifier agents that help automate your customer lead capture workflows effortlessly.
